hero.title: ROBERT BROWN
hero.subtitle: Mémoire du Sol
hero.description: Modernist structure meets organic materiality. A study in texture, deconstruction, and the tactile beauty of raw linen.

image.alt: Close textile crop in warm neutral tones with woven surface texture

fabrics.title: Coming Apart
fabrics.description: An elegant disarray of forms, embodying the beauty in the breakdown of traditional motifs. Printed on artisanal linen, the fragmented pattern speaks to both deconstruction and reassembly, offering a complex yet serene tactile experience.

header.alt: Wide crop of fragmented neutral linen pattern with charcoal forms

lifestyle.alt: Draped linen fabric arranged beside a carved timber chair

detail.alt: Close textile detail showing broken motif marks on woven linen

application.alt: Interior vignette with neutral upholstery and abstract textile accents

fabrics.title: Quiet Strata
fabrics.description: Layered mineral bands move softly across a dry linen ground, balancing architectural rhythm with the irregularity of hand-rendered pigment. The pattern is restrained, dimensional, and quietly atmospheric.

header.alt: Wide crop of layered taupe textile bands on natural linen

lifestyle.alt: Folded fabric lengths styled on a plaster bench in soft light

detail.alt: Close-up of subtle striated weave and mineral toned markings

application.alt: Calm sitting room with tonal drapery and tailored upholstery

fabrics.title: Woven Relic
fabrics.description: A study in softened antiquity, Woven Relic translates archival fragments into a spare contemporary textile. Weathered charcoal, bone, and clay tones create a composed pattern with a collected, timeworn presence.

header.alt: Wide crop of weathered archival textile motifs in charcoal and clay

lifestyle.alt: Editorial fabric lengths layered over an antique console

detail.alt: Close woven surface with softened clay and charcoal motif edges

application.alt: Refined interior with textured pillows and heritage fabric pattern
